featured.title: Scaling Innovation: Inside the ASPIRE Research Ecosystem
featured.description: Hon’ble Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi virtually inaugurated the Aspire – IIT Bombay Research Park Foundation Building on 20 February 2024 in the presence of Member of Parliament Shri Manoj Kotak (Mumbai North-East), Chairperson of the Board of Governors of IIT Bombay Shri. Sharad Saraf, Director of IIT Bombay Prof. Subhasis Chaudhuri, Professor-In-Charge of Aspire – IIT Bombay Research Park Prof. Swaroop Ganguly and Institute functionaries.
